text.title: architecture-decision-records Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for architecture-decision-records as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: ADR used as a design guide: detailed implementation instructions in the Decision section.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: ADRs document the choice, not the implementation. Implementation details belong in design.md. An ADR with implementation details will become stale as the implementation evolves.

failure-mode.description: Missing Alternatives section or alternatives stated as "Option A and Option B were considered."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without pros, cons, and rejection reasons per alternative, the ADR does not prevent re-opening the debate. Alternatives must include why each was rejected.

failure-mode.description: ADRs stored only in a wiki (Confluence, Notion) separate from the codebase.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents cannot access wiki content via file system during code generation. Orphaned ADRs drift out of sync with the actual implementation.

failure-mode.description: Agents fabricating alternatives in the Alternatives Considered section without grounding in real context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hallucinated alternatives undermine the credibility of the entire ADR. Always supply spec.md and design.md as input when asking an agent to write alternatives.

failure-mode.description: Consequences section copied from the Decision section with different wording.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Consequences must describe downstream effects, not restate the decision. Require distinct, actionable consequence bullets in the prompt.

failure-mode.description: Passing all 50+ ADR files to an agent instead of just the index list.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Full ADR history consumes 20-40k tokens. Pass only the index (NNN | Title | Status) and load individual ADRs on demand when their content is needed.
